texto: I have a secret. A big, fat, hairy secret. And I’m not talking minor-league stuff, like I once let Joseph Applebaum feel me up behind the seventh-grade stairwell or I got a Brazilian wax after work last Friday or I’m hiding a neon blue vibrator called the Electric Slide in my night table. Which I’m not, by the way. In case you were wondering.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Karen MacInerney: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “I have a secret. A big, fat, hairy secret. And I’m not talking minor-league stuff, like I once le…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, funny, secret pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
